# The Arena Partners

> Exit advisory for service business owners doing $5M-$50M in revenue. We help owners 55+ maximize their exit value through the Transferable Exit System™.

## About

The Arena Partners is an exit advisory firm based in Houston, TX, founded by Jean Louis Hardy. We specialize in helping service business owners — particularly in trades like plumbing, HVAC, electrical, pest control, landscaping, and roofing — plan and execute their business exit at maximum value.

Our avatar: service business owners aged 55+, with $5M-$50M in annual revenue, who have built something worth selling and want to exit on their terms.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://thearenapartners.com/): Main landing page with the Transferable Exit System™ overview
- [Free Training](https://thearenapartners.com/watch.html): Watch the free Transferable Exit System™ video training
- [Exit Risk Assessment](https://thearenapartners.com/assessment.html): Free 6-question assessment to score your business's exit readiness
- [Business Valuation Calculator](https://thearenapartners.com/calculator.html): Free EBITDA-based valuation calculator for service businesses
- [TRANSFERABLE Book](https://thearenapartners.com/book.html): Full book by Jean Louis Hardy on building a transferable business
- [Blog](https://thearenapartners.com/blog/): Exit planning insights anchored in real stories from Orkin, Wrench Group, Mailchimp, and 30+ companies

## Industry-Specific Valuation Calculators

- [HVAC Business Valuation](https://hvac-valuation.thearenapartners.com/)
- [Plumbing Business Valuation](https://plumbing-valuation.thearenapartners.com/)
- [Electrical Business Valuation](https://electrical-valuation.thearenapartners.com/)
- [Pest Control Business Valuation](https://pest-control-valuation.thearenapartners.com/)
- [Landscaping Business Valuation](https://landscaping-valuation.thearenapartners.com/)
- [Roofing Business Valuation](https://roofing-valuation.thearenapartners.com/)

## Services

- Exit advisory and planning for service business owners
- Business valuation analysis using real PE buyer multiples
- The Transferable Exit System™: 3-phase system to increase business value before selling
- Owner dependency reduction and systems documentation
- Buyer-ready packaging and exit execution

## Key Topics Covered

- Business exit planning for contractors and service companies
- EBITDA multiples by industry (plumbing, HVAC, electrical, pest control, landscaping, roofing)
- Owner-dependent business valuation and how to reduce owner dependency
- Private equity roll-up strategies in the trades
- Succession planning for trade businesses
- The Silver Tsunami: 6 million small business owners reaching retirement by 2035
- Revenue quality, recurring revenue, and customer concentration

## Founder

Jean Louis Hardy — Exit Advisor, author of TRANSFERABLE, founder of The Arena Partners. Based in Houston, TX. Helps service business owners 55+ plan exits that capture the value of 20-30 years of building.
